name: drift-detection scan dry-run computes findings but does not write the report file to disk per the dry-run contract
command: mkdir -p src && printf 'a // rubric: ignore\n' > src/x.js && rm -f report.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/drift-detection/scan.sh" --paths src --out report.jsonl --dry-run 2>err.txt && [ ! -f report.jsonl ] && grep -q 'dry_run=true' err.txt && grep -q 'rubric_ignore' err.txt && echo ok 1>&2
